event_blocks.summary: As a vibrant sunset fades over a cityscape, Host Jie Ni welcomes viewers to 'Running Man' from a classical stone courtyard, inviting them to explore Macau's Fisherman's Wharf and promising exclusive behind-the-scenes footage. The scene shifts to a modern, colorful outdoor area where participants Bai Lu, Sha Yi, and Li Yunrui, all in white t-shirts, begin a search, speculating that 'Kai Ge' (Brother Kai) is hiding nearby, noting a 'deep green' color. Zheng Kai, identified as '郑恺粉笔', performs a thorough ground search, while Bai Lu exclaims the difficulty. Zheng Kai continues his intense search through dense green foliage, joined by Sha Yi, who confidently asserts the hidden person is nearby, comparing their actions to Chen Zhe Yuan's past behavior. Amidst laughter and sound effects, participants question if the hidden person is scared or hiding, with one claiming to have found it. The search intensifies with calls for the hidden person to speak quickly and observations about them observing the search. Chen Zhe Yuan, in a white checkered shirt, searches independently. Sha Yi sarcastically calls the others idiots for not finding it, prompting a suggestion to search inside. The discussion reveals the hidden person's strategy of feigning and misdirection. Sha Yi urges trust in him as Li Yunrui walks purposefully through the 'Teaching Area Building' environment. Bai Lu, feeling the heat, suggests getting a fan as 'Give up searching' appears on screen. Li Yunrui comments 'self-inflicted 800' as 'Persist' appears. Sha Yi diligently searches hedges, vocalizing his efforts and commenting on the coolness of his hiding spot, noting 'Brother Kai hid it here, everyone doesn't need to search,' and lamenting that everyone has given up. He calls out 'Brother, come.' Back indoors, Bai Lu enters cautiously. Outdoors, Sha Yi asks whose item is not found, and Li Yunrui complains about the heat. Sha Yi asks Zheng Kai ('郑恺粉笔') his color, who replies 'pink,' which Bai Lu confirms belongs to 'Brother Chenchen.' Fan PD walks towards the group, and Bai Lu smiles, walking alongside him outdoors, signaling a shift towards collaboration.

李昀锐.description: A participant in a white t-shirt with '李昀锐' printed on the back, seen walking purposefully through the colorful outdoor area. He is heard commenting '这, 自损800' during the search and later exclaiming '太热了!'.

白鹿.description: A participant in a white t-shirt with '白鹿' printed on the back, seen walking through a modern, greenery-filled outdoor area and later indoors, displaying focused and cautious movements. She vocalizes her discomfort with the heat, saying '哎哟, 太热了!' and '拿把扇', and later confirms '粉的是陈晨哥的' in a conversation about colors.

杰妮.description: A female host in a black off-the-shoulder top and white skirt, standing in a classical stone courtyard, holding a black device and gesturing while speaking. Identified by on-screen text as '主持人 杰妮', she welcomes the audience to 'Running Man', introduces herself, and invites them to explore Macau's Fisherman's Wharf, promising behind-the-scenes content.

沙溢.description: A participant in a white t-shirt with '沙溢' printed on the back, actively searching through dense hedges. He frequently vocalizes his search efforts, saying '我是这边看看', '藏这了', '找', '不行, 必须得找, 给它找出来', and comments on strategy like '还是我藏那个地方好, 又凉快' and '凯哥藏这, 大家不用搜'. He also expresses frustration with others giving up ('都放弃了, 都不找了, 都放弃了啊'), calls out '哥哥来', and initiates a conversation about colors, asking '陈晨哥你是啥色?' and '真的假的?'.

郑恺粉笔.description: A participant in a white t-shirt, identified by on-screen text as '郑恺粉笔', performing a thorough search by crouching and inspecting the ground closely. He is heard confirming his color as '粉的' (pink) when asked by 沙溢.

陈哲远.description: A participant in a white checkered shirt, visually walking through the outdoor area and appearing to search independently. He is mentioned in the audio as someone whose "performance is exactly like what I just pushed back to Chen Zhuoyuan," suggesting he might be the subject of the search or a strategic player.

范PD.description: A participant in a white t-shirt with '范PD' printed on the back, seen walking down a corridor toward a group, later walking outdoors with 白鹿, suggesting a leadership or coordinating role in the challenge.

raw_segments: The segment opens with a vibrant sunset over a cityscape, featuring a large orange sun and silhouetted buildings, as dramatic, suspenseful intro music plays. The text 'EP12 跑男来了' (Episode 12, Running Man is here) is overlaid, signaling the start of the show. The scene transitions to Host Jie Ni, identified by on-screen text, standing in a classical-style stone courtyard. Dressed in a black off-the-shoulder top and white skirt, she holds a small black device and gestures expressively as she greets the audience, welcoming them to 'Running Man'. Jie Ni introduces herself and invites viewers to explore Macau's famous Fisherman's Wharf, highlighting its grand Roman amphitheater and charming European-style coastline, before emphasizing that the most important part is to deliver exclusive behind-the-scenes footage. Following her introduction, the setting shifts to a modern, colorful outdoor area with greenery and geometric structures. Game-like background music begins as participants Bai Lu, Sha Yi, and Li Yunrui, all in white t-shirts with their names printed on the back, are seen walking and searching. Male voices are heard discussing 'Kai Ge' (Brother Kai), speculating he's hiding nearby and mentioning they saw him pass by, noting a 'deep green' color. One voice calls out 'Jia Lin, come here!' Another confirms, 'Kai Ge is hiding here, I saw him walk from here,' reiterating the 'deep green' color. Zheng Kai, identified by on-screen text as '郑恺粉笔', performs a '地毯式搜索' (thorough search), crouching and inspecting the ground closely. Amidst the search, a female voice, likely Bai Lu, exclaims, 'Wow, this is so hard!' The bright, lively environment and engaged participants contribute to a dynamic and energetic atmosphere.

The segment opens with '郑恺粉笔', in a white t-shirt, intensely searching through dense green foliage in a modern, sunny outdoor courtyard, methodically inspecting the ground and plants for a hidden object. He is soon joined by '沙溢', also in a white t-shirt, who assists in the search, gesturing and discussing their findings. An unidentified male voice, likely '沙溢', confidently states, "I'm telling you, he's definitely hiding here," comparing the hidden person's actions to '陈哲远's previous behavior, adding, "His current performance is exactly like what I just pushed back to Chen Zhuoyuan." Another voice asks, "Whose performance?" as laughter and sound effects punctuate the scene. Participants are heard asking, "Scared, aren't you?" and "Are you hiding there?" while one claims, "I've already got it all." The search continues with questions like "Where is it hidden? Speak quickly!" and observations like "Oh, it's here, right? Came over to see for himself." '陈哲远', in a white checkered shirt, is then seen walking through the same area, searching independently. The voice, likely '沙溢', sarcastically comments, "Can't even find it like this, a bunch of idiots," prompting another to suggest, "Then I'll go in and look." The discussion continues about the hidden person's strategy: "He was just looking over here, seeing if we could get it," and "He's definitely feigning... He deliberately led you here, but he's hiding here, trust me." The segment concludes with a participant urging, "Trust Brother Sha, keep looking," as '李昀锐' walks purposefully through the modern courtyard, passing colorful benches and greenery, his back to the camera, amidst the bright, architecturally distinct 'Teaching Area Building' environment.

The minute opens with a wide shot of a modern, multi-level outdoor area, vibrant with colorful staircases, greenery, and outdoor seating, establishing a playful environment set to light, suspenseful background music. 白鹿, in her white t-shirt, walks through the greenery with a focused expression, occasionally adjusting her hair. She vocalizes her discomfort, exclaiming "哎哟, 太热了!" (Oh, it's too hot!) and later suggests "拿把扇" (Get a fan), accompanied by the distinct sounds of a fan opening and closing. On-screen text '放弃寻找' (Give up searching) appears. 李昀锐, also in a white t-shirt, walks purposefully through the same colorful outdoor space, his back to the camera, while a male voice (likely his) comments "这, 自损800" (This, self-inflicted 800). The text '坚持' (Persist) appears. 沙溢, similarly dressed, is then seen crouching and searching through dense hedges with determination, frequently vocalizing his search efforts: "我是这边看看" (I'll look over here), "藏这了" (Hidden here), "找" (Search), and "不行, 必须得找, 给它找出来" (No, must find it, find it out). He also comments on the strategy, saying "还是我藏那个地方好, 又凉快" (Still, the place I hid it is good, and cool) and "凯哥藏这, 大家不用搜" (Brother Kai hid it here, everyone doesn't need to search). He later laments, "都放弃了, 都不找了, 都放弃了啊" (Everyone gave up, no one is searching anymore, everyone gave up, huh), and calls out "哥哥来" (Brother, come). The scene shifts indoors to a modern, well-lit space where 白鹿 enters cautiously. Back outdoors, 沙溢 asks, "还有谁的没找到?" (Whose else hasn't been found?), to which a male voice (likely 李昀锐) adds, "太热了!" (It's too hot!). 沙溢 then asks 郑恺粉笔, who is also searching, "陈晨哥你是啥色?" (Brother Chenchen, what color are you?), and 郑恺粉笔 replies, "我是粉的" (I am pink), which 白鹿 confirms, "粉的是陈晨哥的" (Pink is Brother Chenchen's). 范PD, identifiable by his label, walks down a corridor toward the group, who appear to be converging. The minute concludes with 白鹿 smiling and walking alongside 范PD outdoors, suggesting a shift from individual search to collaborative movement, all set against the energetic, game-like atmosphere.

event_blocks.summary: In a brightly lit café, '郑恺粉笔' adjusts a ceiling fan while a blonde-haired participant discusses hiding spots, lamenting the prolonged search. '范PD' exits the café and joins '周深' outdoors, as male voices continue their search. Meanwhile, in a large auditorium, '李晨', wearing a white 'Keep Running' t-shirt, inspects the stage area, interacting with crew members and examining a small object, questioning its purpose and playfully addressing someone named Chen. He then moves to an outdoor nighttime pool challenge with tropical decor, where participants navigate floating platforms amidst splashing and shouts. On-screen text indicates group departures, and participants like '宋雨琦' in yellow and a participant in blue urge each other forward. The challenge intensifies with physical exertion, kicking, and pushing, culminating in close-ups of focused expressions. The pool challenge continues with '沙溢' urging a teammate down and participants struggling to hold each other, leading to laughter and exclamations. On-screen text marks further group departures, and '沙溢' repeatedly calls his own name in distress, while the participant in blue shouts warnings and '宋雨琦' calls for '沙溢' to wait as someone approaches from behind, concluding with intense splashing and filming by crew members.

李晨.description: A participant in a white 'Keep Running' t-shirt and white pants, actively searching the auditorium floor, bending down to inspect objects, and interacting with crew members while holding a small item, possibly a chalk or marker. He speaks playfully and mischievously, identifying items and expressing concern about breaking them, with lines like '给你带的伴手礼', '这么残忍吗?', and '我别在这给人弄坏了'.

Blonde-haired participant.description: A participant with long blonde hair tied in a high ponytail, wearing a yellow shirt labeled '宋雨琦', actively pushing and balancing on a floating platform, showing determination and effort. Her high-pitched, energetic voice is heard shouting instructions and exclamations like "抱住他，抱住他！" (Hold him, hold him!), "哇！救我！" (Wah! Save me!), "啊！" (Ah!), and "沙溢！等一下！" (Sha Yi! Wait a moment!).

周深.description: A participant in a white t-shirt with '周深' printed on the back, walking outdoors with 范PD, moving through a green, stone-walled area with purpose, amidst ongoing discussions about searching and hiding.

郑恺粉笔.description: A participant in a white t-shirt with '郑恺粉笔' printed on the back, actively adjusting a ceiling fan in a café, showing focused and hands-on behavior, while conversations about hiding and searching unfold around him.

范PD.description: A participant in a white t-shirt with '范PD' printed on the back, visually walking through a café and then descending stairs, appearing to lead or coordinate movement. He is identified as '范丞丞' by another participant's voice asking if his item was found.

Crew member with monitor.description: A crew member in a plaid shirt, seated and holding a monitor, providing visual feedback to 李晨 as he inspects the floor.

Auditorium crew member in white vest.description: A crew member in a white vest and blue lanyard, standing near the camera setup, overseeing the filming process.

Crew member with camera on tripod.description: A crew member in a black shirt and shorts, holding a camera on a tripod, observing and filming the participants' movements from the side of the pool.

Crew member with handheld camera.description: A crew member in a black shirt with a yellow logo, holding a handheld camera, capturing 李晨’s movements from close range.

Pool challenge setup.description: A large outdoor pool with floating platforms, surrounded by tropical decor including surfboards, life rings, and illuminated architectural elements, serving as the stage for a team-based physical challenge.

Participant in blue shirt.description: A participant in a blue shirt, lying on the floating platform and pushing forward with effort, working in coordination with the blonde-haired participant to maintain balance and progress.

On-screen text indicators.description: Chinese text overlays such as '第四组出发', '最后一组出发', '稳住，我们能赢', and '那边下去' appear to mark team departures and encourage participants during the challenge.

Participant in yellow shirt labeled '宋雨琦.description: A participant in a yellow shirt with '宋雨琦' printed on the back, actively pushing and balancing on the floating platform, working closely with teammates to maintain stability.

Participant in blue shirt labeled '张真源'.description: A participant in a blue shirt with '张真源' printed on the back, seen lying on the platform and pushing forward, contributing to the team's movement across the pool. His voice is heard urgently shouting "别别别别别别别别别！" (No no no no no no no no no!).

Participant in yellow shirt labeled '沙溢'.description: A participant in a yellow shirt with '沙溢' printed on the back, actively pushing on the floating platform, showing physical effort and coordination with teammates. His distinct voice is frequently heard, often in distress or giving instructions, including "哥，你一起下去吧，你拖了俩" (Brother, go down together, you're dragging two), complaining "你他抱著我，我下不去，你看他抱著我" (He's holding me, I can't go down, look he's holding me), repeatedly shouting "哎呀!" (Aiya!) and his own name "沙溢!" (Sha Yi!), and warning "后面有人！后面有人！" (Someone behind! Someone behind!).

raw_segments: The video opens with an upbeat, light background music as a smiling participant is shown in close-up, followed by an aerial view of a modern urban complex surrounded by greenery and high-rise buildings. The scene transitions to the interior of a brightly lit café with wooden shelves and modern decor, where a participant, '郑恺粉笔', is seen actively adjusting a ceiling fan, observed by a blonde-haired participant. Amidst the sounds of conversation and laughter, male voices discuss hiding spots, with one noting, "He didn't hide in a place like this," and another suggesting, "That means there are even better places than this." A female voice, likely the blonde-haired participant, exclaims, "You've already broken me, and you still have the nerve to say that!" as she later adds, "Oh my god, we've been searching in this cafe for so long, and you still haven't found it." '范PD' (later addressed as '范丞丞' by another participant) walks through the café, passing a counter with a 'Happy Father's Day' sign and a menu board displaying 'ELYSÉE', then descends a staircase and exits. He joins '周深' in a green outdoor area with stone walls and yellow railings, as the male voices continue their search, with one excitedly declaring, "Hey, hey, there must be something in here!" and another lamenting, "We've been searching for almost 30 minutes here." The scene shifts to a large, empty auditorium where '李晨' walks up the steps, carrying a blue bag, and approaches the stage area with a large screen displaying 'Keep Running'. Electronic beeping sounds punctuate the scene as a male voice asks, "You hid here, right?" suggesting a game or challenge is underway.

The segment opens with 李晨, clad in a white 'Keep Running' t-shirt and white pants, descending a staircase in a large, warmly lit auditorium with wooden floors and tiered red seating. As he walks purposefully across the stage, passing '安慕希' yogurt promotional displays, he utters "碎" (broken/shattered) and asks "现在有没有人是整个的呢?" (Is anyone whole now?), to which another male voice responds, "没有是整个的吧现在." (No one is whole now, right?). He continues his search, remarking "换茬" and "没找着呢" (haven't found it yet), while a light, suspenseful background music begins to play. He glances around, bending down to inspect the floor near a camera setup, interacting with crew members, including one with a camera on a tripod and another with a monitor. A bell rings, followed by a distinct 'ding' and a 'clink' sound, prompting an exaggerated "Ahhh" from 李晨, who then comments, "挺怪的" (quite strange) and "感觉有点怪呀这是" (this feels a bit strange). He picks up a small object, possibly a chalk or marker, examining it closely, and questions, "我一进来咱那第一个头, 好像, 演啥呢这是?" (As soon as I came in, our first head, it seems, what is this acting?). As he continues to move through the active, investigative production environment, with multiple cameras and lighting equipment visible, he exclaims "咦, 没有" (huh, no) and notes "这后面没" (not behind here), followed by another "Ahhh" sound. Playfully, he instructs, "我跟你讲, 你别再那啥了, 陈这第一个就碎了, 你家的不好. 你就别故意往炕了, 我跟你讲, 啊. 你自己咋回事, 自己心里有点数." (Let me tell you, don't do that anymore, Chen, this first one is broken, your family's is not good. Don't deliberately go to the kang, I'm telling you, ah. You should know what's wrong with you.). A crew member interjects with a brief "哟." 李晨 then exclaims "哎哟, 哎哟呵" and asks "这啥玩意这是?" (What is this thing?). He states, "这是我, 这是刚刚给我的," which is immediately contradicted by another male voice saying "不是." 李晨 playfully responds "哎, 哎" with a laugh as he walks up a set of red stairs, still holding the object, with the background music continuing and ending with a final 'ding'.

The segment opens in an auditorium with rows of empty wooden seats, where 李晨, wearing a white 'Keep Running' t-shirt and white pants, is actively searching the floor, bending down and inspecting objects while holding a small item, possibly chalk. He playfully remarks, "给你带的伴手礼" (The souvenir I brought you), "一绝" (Amazing), and "这么残忍吗?" (Is it that cruel?), before identifying an item as "你的冰，这陈哲远的是吧?" (Your ice, this is Chen Zheyuan's, right?), to which he confirms, "当然了" (Of course). After a distinct chime sound, he exclaims, "这个不行啊" (This won't do), and then, "这个不行，这个不行，这个我拿走" (This won't do, this won't do, I'll take this), adding, "我别在这给人弄坏了，我是上外弄坏的" (I shouldn't break it here, I broke it outside), all while being filmed by multiple crew members. Following a sound of applause and a whistle, the scene transitions to an outdoor nighttime setting with a large pool and tropical decor, where a team-based challenge commences with intense electronic background music and splashing sounds. On-screen text indicates group departures, '第一组出发', '第二组出发', and '第三组出发'. Participants, including a blonde-haired participant in a yellow '宋雨琦' shirt and another in a blue shirt, are seen navigating a floating platform. 宋雨琦's energetic voice is heard saying, "我再推" (I'll push again) and repeatedly, "快走! 快走!" (Go fast! Go fast!), while other male participants shout encouragement and instructions like "我冲一把来" (I'll make a dash), "给我" (Give it to me), "踢他!" (Kick him!), "踢脸!" (Kick the face!), "踹他!" (Kick him!), and "推他! 推他!" (Push him! Push him!). The atmosphere is lively and competitive, with close-ups capturing their focused expressions and physical exertion as they maneuver the platform, culminating in a yellow-shirted participant giving a gentle push to the blue-shirted participant amidst continued shouts of "小李! 小李!", "小林!", and "完了完了!" (It's over!).

The chaotic and energetic team challenge unfolds in a large outdoor pool, adorned with tropical decor and illuminated architectural elements, as participants in yellow and blue shirts navigate floating platforms. Amidst constant splashing and an upbeat background track, a male voice (沙溢) urges, "哥，你一起下去吧，你拖了俩" (Brother, go down together, you're dragging two), followed by another male voice shouting "哥，头！" (Brother, head!). The blonde-haired participant (宋雨琦) in yellow, actively pushing and balancing, cries out "抱住他，抱住他！" (Hold him, hold him!) during a struggle, while another male voice shouts "救不到！" (Can't save!). Laughter and excited chatter erupt after a big splash, with 宋雨琦 exclaiming "哇！救我！" (Wah! Save me!). 沙溢's voice is heard again, complaining, "你他抱著我，我下不去，你看他抱著我" (He's holding me, I can't go down, look he's holding me), punctuated by grunts and repeated shouts of "哎呀!" (Aiya!). On-screen text like '第四组出发' (Fourth group departs) and '最后一组出发' (Last group departs) flashes, indicating the challenge's progression. 沙溢 repeatedly shouts his own name, "沙溢!" (Sha Yi!), in a mix of effort and distress. The participant in blue (张真源), lying down and pushing, urgently shouts "别别别别别别别别别！" (No no no no no no no no no!). 宋雨琦 then calls out "沙溢！等一下！" (Sha Yi! Wait a moment!), as 沙溢 warns, "后面有人！后面有人！" (Someone behind! Someone behind!). The segment concludes with intense splashing, shouts, and physical exertion, highlighting the teams' desperate attempts to cross the pool, all while crew members film the action.

event_blocks.summary: The segment begins with a boisterous pool challenge at the Galaxy Macau resort, featuring participants like '沙溢' and '宋雨琦' on the yellow team and '张真源' on the blue team, struggling on unstable floating platforms amidst splashing water and grunts of effort, with an announcer calling out the final 15 seconds and a countdown to the game's end. On-screen text indicated the yellow team's lead with '黄队: 2人' and '蓝队: 1人'. Post-game, '沙溢' humorously complained about '张真源' dragging him down, comparing the sensation to an elevator. The scene shifts to the resort's illuminated exterior at night before transitioning inside a white curtained tent labeled '会客室', where '张真源', now with wet, reddish hair, appears tired. Inside the tent, '沙溢' engaged '张真源' in conversation about an unknown punishment, mentioning a bungee jump in Macau and their departure the next morning. '沙溢' revealed he had six 'tickets' and, after a moment of disbelief from '张真源', successfully executed a prank by leaving only one item in a silver case, eliciting hearty laughter and cartoonish sound effects, with on-screen text proclaiming '计谋成功' (Scheme successful). '沙溢' then exited, leaving '张真源' to await his punishment. Another participant in a blue shirt entered, sharing a laugh with '张真源' as playful music and on-screen text like '我太了解你了' (I know you too well) and '给你个惊喜!' (Giving you a surprise!) reinforced the light-hearted atmosphere.

Galaxy Macau resort exterior.description: A grand, illuminated building at night with golden lights and a prominent 'GALAXY' sign, featuring ornate architecture and palm trees, serving as the backdrop for the transition scene.

White curtained tent.description: A large, elegant tent with white drapes and golden accents, labeled '会客室', where participants enter after the pool challenge, serving as a setting for post-game conversations among the participants.

Participant in blue shirt labeled '张真源'.description: A participant in a blue shirt with wet, reddish hair, seated at a table, initially contemplative, then reacting with surprise and hearty laughter during a playful interaction. He audibly responds with "不知道" (I don't know), remarks "但是我有点拽" (but I'm a bit cocky/proud), and expresses surprise with "真的?" (Really?) and "重新" (Again).

Participant in yellow shirt labeled '沙溢'.description: A participant in a yellow shirt, entering the tent, engaging in animated conversation, gesturing expressively, and opening a silver case to reveal a single object before exiting. He audibly asks about "惩罚" (punishment), discusses "澳门那个蹦极" (that bungee jump in Macau), reacts to '张真源's remark, states "我有六票" (I have six tickets), declares "你等着受惩罚吧" (You wait for your punishment!), and explains his prank of leaving only one item in the case, concluding with "就等你来啊" (Just waiting for you to come).

Pool challenge setup.description: A large outdoor pool with floating platforms, surrounded by tropical decor, serving as the stage for a team-based physical challenge, filled with the sounds of splashing water, grunts of effort, and cheers from the crowd.

Participant in blue shirt.description: A participant in a blue shirt, entering the tent after the yellow-shirted participant leaves, sitting down, and sharing a moment of laughter with the first blue-shirted participant, indicating a shift to a more relaxed and friendly interaction.

On-screen text indicators.description: Chinese text overlays such as '目前剩余 黄队: 2人 蓝队: 1人' and '游戏结束' appear to mark the remaining team members and the conclusion of the challenge, with additional text '丽澳思门卡尔顿酒' and 'GALAXY' displayed during the transition to the resort exterior.

Blonde-haired participant.description: A participant with long blonde hair tied in a high ponytail, wearing a yellow shirt labeled '宋雨琦', actively pushing and balancing on a floating platform, showing determination and effort, letting out distinct screams of exertion during the chaotic challenge, later seen smiling after the game ends.

Participant in blue shirt with wet reddi.description: A participant in a blue shirt, now with wet, reddish hair, appearing tired and contemplative, sitting quietly inside the tent after the game, showing a shift from active competition to post-game reflection.

raw_segments: The segment opens with a chaotic and energetic pool challenge, filled with the sounds of splashing water, grunts of effort, and an upbeat soundtrack. Participants in yellow and blue shirts, including '沙溢' and the blonde-haired '宋雨琦' for the yellow team, and '张真源' for the blue team, are seen pushing and balancing on dramatically wobbling floating platforms. An announcer's voice declares "最后15秒" (Last 15 seconds) as the struggle intensifies, with '宋雨琦' letting out distinct screams of exertion as participants fall into the water. On-screen text indicates the yellow team's advantage with '黄队: 2人' and '蓝队: 1人'. The announcer counts down "5, 4, 3, 2, 1", culminating in a whistle blast and cheers as the game concludes with '游戏结束'. Visibly exhausted but smiling, participants exit the pool. '沙溢' is then heard complaining, "张真源把我拖下来了。好累啊。我感觉我跟电梯一样上上下下的。" (Zhang Zhenyuan dragged me down. So tired. I feel like I was going up and down like an elevator.). The scene transitions to a nighttime exterior of the Galaxy Macau resort, illuminated with golden lights, followed by a shot of participants entering a white curtained tent labeled '会客室'. Inside, a female voice asks, "你这哪儿是沙哥?" (Where is this, Brother Sha?), to which '沙溢' replies, "你要去聊天呢，我就去饭堂。" (If you want to chat, I'll go to the cafeteria.), with another male voice, possibly '张真源', interjecting, "你要去啊?" (You're going?). The segment concludes with '张真源', now with wet, reddish hair, appearing tired and contemplative, sitting quietly inside the tent.

The scene unfolds inside a white curtained tent, labeled '会客室' with a blue 'R' logo and an '安慕希' sign on the wall. Participant '张真源', in a blue shirt with wet, reddish hair, is initially seated contemplatively at a small round table. Light, playful background music begins as Participant '沙溢', in a yellow shirt, enters, approaching the table and engaging '张真源' in conversation. '沙溢' asks, "你知道惩罚是什么吗?" (Do you know what the punishment is?), to which '张真源' responds, "不知道" (I don't know). '沙溢' animatedly discusses "澳门那个蹦极" (that bungee jump in Macau) and the plan for "明天早上我们都走了" (we'll all leave tomorrow morning). '张真源' then remarks, "但是我有点拽" (but I'm a bit cocky/proud), prompting '沙溢' to exclaim, "有点拽, 你看都说漏了" (a bit cocky, you see, you've let it slip!). '沙溢' then states, "我有六票" (I have six tickets), which '张真源' questions with a surprised "真的?" (Really?) and "重新" (Again). '沙溢' repeats, "我有六票". As '沙溢' opens a silver case on the table, revealing a single small object, '张真源' reacts with disbelief, followed by hearty laughter, accompanied by cartoonish sound effects and on-screen text like '计谋成功' (Scheme successful). '沙溢' declares, "你等着受惩罚吧" (You wait for your punishment!), further explaining his prank: "你给我留一个做个效果行不行...不差这一个" (How about you leave one for me to make an effect... it won't make a difference), detailing his plan to leave only one item in the case. After more laughter and sound effects, '沙溢' exits, saying, "就等你来啊" (Just waiting for you to come). Shortly after, another participant in a blue shirt enters, sits down, and shares a moment of laughter with '张真源', maintaining the light-hearted and playful atmosphere, emphasized by on-screen text such as '我太了解你了' (I know you too well) and '给你个惊喜!' (Giving you a surprise!).

The "张飞" chant continues, followed by a male voice suggesting, "会出一部电影叫张飞传" (a movie called 'The Legend of Zhang Fei' will come out), eliciting more laughter. 沙溢 is heard denying, "没有叫过张飞" (never called Zhang Fei). (Brother Sha, are you polite?), '来都来了' (You're already here), and '不敢' (Don't dare) appears, highlighting humorous exchanges. The scene briefly cuts to a nighttime cityscape and a warmly lit alleyway before returning to the van. event_blocks.summary: Inside a dimly lit, moving van adorned with city lights visible through the windows, participants 沙溢, 李昀锐, 陈哲远, 白鹿, and a Blonde-haired individual, all in white 'Keep Running' t-shirts, share a cheerful evening mood filled with lively conversation and laughter, with 浙江卫视 on-screen text consistently present. 沙溢 remarks, "我多坚持不了一分钟," questioning, "是不是因为你们跑步的人脚比较敏感?" and adding, "就就就反正就是肉肉比较少." 白鹿 playfully tells "小林" (Xiaolin), "你今天你今天下午真的对不起你的四千米," eliciting group laughter. The scene transitions to a brightly lit studio set featuring colorful, ornate backdrops, where the group stands on a blue platform, actively engaged in an energetic game with yellow props, coordinating movements amidst shouts of "加油!" (Come on!). 李昀锐 confidently states, "没问题," while 陈哲远 inquires, "我如果下来会怎么样?" to which a male voice responds, "不会怎么样," prompting an excited "那就太好了" and a loud "啊!" followed by laughter. Later, a male voice, likely 沙溢, discusses "这俩个领域" (these two fields/areas), noting how something "真的是给逼出来的" (was really forced out) and mentioning "张真源的那个真的是硬币" (Zhang Zhenyuan's was really a tough one), again met with laughter. The video intersperses the van's relaxed ambiance with the studio's focused, playful intensity, maintaining a fast-paced, engaging rhythm.

Amidst more laughter, a crew member humorously reveals, "他为了拍摄显白，专门出门前擦了防晒" (To look fair for the shoot, he specifically applied sunscreen before going out), leading to further amusement. The segment concludes with a close-up of a crew member reacting with surprise, saying "真的吗?" (Really?), as another male voice comments on "个人形象" (personal image), capturing a moment of unexpected humor during the pre-meeting preparations.

The video opens in a modern conference room with vertical wood paneling, a large screen displaying the 'Keep Running' logo, and a whiteboard covered in photos and notes. A woman in a white dress and gray cardigan stands before a group of crew members, leading a discussion. A male voice is heard stating that the requirement is not for being on camera, followed by a playful "Ten oils, come to me." The atmosphere shifts to a lighthearted moment as a man with short dark hair reacts with surprise to a blue tissue being dabbed near his eye, accompanied by distinct cat meow sound effects and an "Aiyo!" exclamation. He then checks his phone with a satisfied expression, confirmed by the on-screen text '满意' (satisfied). The scene returns to the meeting, where the woman in the white dress explains that PD Yang will introduce Teacher Fan as the interim chief director for tomorrow, emphasizing the need for everyone to cooperate with his work. She continues, detailing how PD Yang will introduce crew representatives from the camera team and others, allowing PD Fan to familiarize himself with everyone. She further clarifies that PD Yang will facilitate discussions for each workstation to present their needs for PD Fan's confirmation, encouraging them to bring up their requirements. A male voice interjects with "Quickly, quickly" and later discusses setting an order, to which the woman agrees that there won't be a specific sequence. The discussion then turns more technical, with the woman mentioning that Zhu Anjie might address potential light leaks and their solutions. A male voice responds, finding this topic "a bit professional" and later praises Zhu Anjie's input. The male voice then elaborates on outdoor shooting challenges, advising to remind artists about strong sunlight and how to manage lighting. Throughout, crew members in black t-shirts with yellow 'R' logos and blue lanyards are actively involved, reviewing documents, gesturing, and interacting with devices, while on-screen text like '梳理会议流程' (organizing meeting flow) and '调整沟通话术' (adjusting communication scripts) reinforces the meeting's purpose. A crew member with a camera on a tripod films the interactions, capturing the focused yet lighthearted preparation for the upcoming recording session, as upbeat background music begins to play.

event_blocks.summary: In a modern conference room adorned with vertical wood paneling and potted plants, crew members prepare for a pre-recording meeting amidst upbeat, game-show-like music. A man with blonde hair and glasses, identified as Fan Chengcheng, receives a call from a man with reddish hair who explains that tomorrow's recording involves a special identity and invites him for a discussion. The scene shifts to Fan PD, the man with reddish hair, receiving a 'Director's Prop Box' containing a walkie-talkie, temporary chief director badge, work permit, schedule, and whistle, officially designating him as the 'One-Day Temporary Chief Director' responsible for on-site coordination. He playfully interacts with another male voice, questioning the origin of the items and asserting his role. The narrative then details the selection of nine staff members by Fan PD for fairness, with on-screen text like '剥夺投票资格' (Disqualify Voting Rights) appearing. He humorously recruits various crew members, including camera operators, audio technicians, and costume staff, referring to them as his 'soldiers' and complaining about past costume issues. The Man with blonde hair and glasses, Fan Chengcheng, calmly agrees to the process, emphasizing fairness. Later, Fan PD introduces Fan Chengcheng as the Chief Director for the day and the following day, prompting applause from the crew. They discuss potential punishments, with Fan PD jokingly suggesting bungee jumping, leading to laughter and on-screen text like '感觉被拿捏了' (Feeling Controlled). Fan PD then instructs on camera-facing protocols for artists, questioning who consistently avoids facing the camera, with Fan Chengcheng asking if it's him.

raw_segments: The video opens in a modern conference room, where crew members are busy preparing for a pre-recording meeting, accompanied by upbeat, game-show-like background music. A crew member with glasses and a blue lanyard holds papers and converses, while another in a black t-shirt with a yellow 'R' logo rests his chin on his hand. A woman in a 'THREE' t-shirt organizes materials, and another with long dark hair actively participates in discussions. The room, adorned with vertical wood paneling and potted plants, features a large screen displaying the 'Keep Running' logo, with on-screen text indicating they are 'organizing meeting flow' and 'adjusting communication scripts'. A bell chime and a brief 'dābā' sound punctuate the scene before an old-fashioned phone rings. The scene transitions to a wide shot, focusing on a man with blonde hair and glasses seated at a long white table, seemingly on a phone call, as indicated by a cartoon overlay. He is heard greeting someone as 'Chengcheng' and explaining that 'tomorrow's recording has a very important special identity,' asking them to come to the director's meeting room on the second floor of the hotel for a discussion. After confirming the details and saying 'bye-bye,' the call ends. Playful, upbeat music returns with cartoon sound effects. Suddenly, a man with reddish hair in a white shirt enters from a side door, smiling confidently. He walks to the table, sits opposite the blonde man, and greets him with a 'Hi,' followed by laughter. He then explains that as the season concludes, they want to 'fulfill his PD dream' and present him with a 'belated birthday gift,' promising 'director's essential items' for 'Chengcheng' (the blonde man), before the audio cuts off. The atmosphere shifts from a collaborative prep session to a more formal, yet relaxed, meeting setup between the two men.

The video opens in a modern conference room with vertical wood paneling and potted plants. A man with reddish hair, later identified as **Fan PD**, wearing a white shirt, is seated at a long white table. As a woman in a black t-shirt with a yellow 'R' logo hands him a black hard-shell case labeled '导演道具箱' (Director's Prop Box), a male voice says, "来看一下" (Let's take a look). Upbeat, slightly dramatic background music begins as Fan PD opens the case, revealing a blue lanyard with a badge and a small blue object. He exclaims "哎哟!" (Oh!) as he examines the contents. A narrator's voice identifies him as "范PD" and lists the items he's handling: "对讲机" (walkie-talkie), "临时总导演" (Temporary Chief Director), "工作证" (work permit/badge), "恰表" (schedule/chart), and "口哨" (whistle). Fan PD expresses surprise, stating, "你这些东西从来没在我身上出现过" (These things have never appeared on me before), to which another male voice replies, "我都在用啊" (I use them all the time), prompting Fan PD to playfully retort, "跟你有什么关系" (What does that have to do with you?). He then places a white card with '范PD' and a blue card labeled '临时总导演' into the case, closing it and clapping his hands with a focused expression. The camera pulls back to reveal a wide shot of the room, showing a large screen displaying the 'Keep Running' logo and a whiteboard with photos and notes. The narrator confirms his role: "所以你在明天的节目当中的特殊身份就是一日临时总导演" (So your special identity in tomorrow's program is One-Day Temporary Chief Director), as on-screen text '一日临时总导演' appears beside Fan PD, and a group reacts with "哇!". The narrator further explains that Fan PD "就只需要负责现场录制的所有统筹工作" (just needs to be responsible for all the coordination work for the on-site recording), essentially taking over "我的一些工作" (some of my daily work). Fan PD then asks, "那明天你不会出现吗?" (So you won't appear tomorrow?), to which the narrator begins to reply, "我出现，但是..." (I will appear, but...), as the segment ends. The atmosphere is professional yet playful, suggesting a behind-the-scenes setup for a game or challenge segment.

The video opens with a close-up of the Man with reddish hair in a white shirt, seated thoughtfully in a modern conference room. A male voice immediately addresses him, stating, "基本上整个现场就是由你来控制" (Basically, the entire scene will be controlled by you), assigning him a leadership role. Another voice questions, "这其实是民意是不是?" (Is this actually public opinion?), followed by the first male voice playfully explaining, "因为昨天我我帮那个所有摄像组和那个导演组报了仇" (Because yesterday I... I helped all the camera crew and the director team get revenge), which elicits a burst of enthusiastic laughter, cheering, clapping, and whistles from unseen participants, creating a lively, playful atmosphere. A brief outdoor night scene of the Man with blonde hair and glasses walking near palm trees serves as a quick transition before returning to the conference room. The Man with reddish hair then interacts with a black hard-shell case labeled '导演道具箱' (Director's Prop Box), examining its contents, including a blue lanyard and badge. A woman in a black t-shirt with 'THREE' print hands him a document. The first male voice continues, "所以现在要给你送上一个我们的内容。你现在拿到的就是奔跑吧每一期最核心的内容方案" (So now we're going to present you with our content. What you're holding now is the core content plan for every episode of Keep Running), as the man reads the document, which is a script or schedule for '奔跑吧' (Keep Running). An exclamation of "哎哟!" (Oh!) is heard, possibly from the man himself, as he looks up, seemingly preparing for his role. The camera pans to reveal a wider view of the modern conference room, with vertical wood paneling, potted plants, a large screen displaying the 'Keep Running' logo, and a yellow 'R' emblem. The Man with blonde hair and glasses is seated across the table, engaged in conversation. A whiteboard covered with photos, notes, and diagrams, including game elements like '游戏二' (Game Two), is visible, indicating planning for a challenge. The first male voice then details game elements, "首先是钻石，你看到了这里有两款钻石，一个蓝色的方形和一个黄色的圆形。你挑一个吧，你想要哪个?" (First are the diamonds. You see there are two types of diamonds here, a blue square and a yellow circle. Pick one, which one do you want?). The Man with reddish hair confidently responds, "我肯定是蓝色" (I'll definitely take the blue one), to which the first male voice confirms, "行。剩余的黄色的圆形是我的" (Okay. The remaining yellow circle is mine). The Man with reddish hair agrees with a simple "好" (Good). On-screen text identifies the Man with reddish hair as '临时总导演' (Temporary Chief Director) and '一日临时总导演' (One-Day Temporary Chief Director). He claps his hands with a focused expression, signaling readiness. The first male voice further explains the game's tie-breaking rules, "如果大家的票数打平了分不出胜负...我们就现场让工作人员来投票" (If everyone's votes are tied and no winner can be determined... we will have the staff vote on the spot), which the Man with reddish hair approves with "太好" (Great), reinforcing the professional yet playful atmosphere of organizing the meeting flow.

The scene unfolds in a modern conference room with vertical wood paneling and a large screen displaying the 'Keep Running' logo. The man with reddish hair, identified by on-screen text as '临时总导演' (Temporary Chief Director) and later playfully referred to as '范导' by an off-screen voice, speaks with a clear, authoritative yet humorous tone. He explains to the blonde-haired man with glasses that for fairness, the blonde-haired man must designate nine staff members, stating, "虽然相对客观...他们可能对我也有意见,也有可能对你也有意见,就是他们相对公平吧." (Although relatively objective... they might have opinions about me, and they might also have opinions about you. They are relatively fair, I guess.) He then adds playfully, "我低低头," followed by laughter. He continues, "所以现在为了公平起见...我们就请你现场来指定九位工作人员,这样的话我们是不改的,且这九位是你定出来的." (So now, for the sake of fairness... we invite you to designate nine staff members on the spot. We won't change this, and these nine will be chosen by you.) The blonde-haired man, holding a phone and a drink, calmly agrees, "行,一切为了保持公允,好吧," (Okay, everything to maintain fairness, alright.) followed by a distinct 'ding' sound. The reddish-haired man then picks up a black hard-shell case labeled '导演道具箱' and opens a black folder labeled '工作人员花名册', flipping through pages with handwritten notes, displaying a serious and concentrated expression. On-screen text '剥夺投票资格' appears briefly. The blonde-haired man then challenges, "这不全是你的的人吗?" (Aren't these all your people?), to which the reddish-haired man denies, "没有," and defends the staff's objectivity, stating they sometimes argue with him until their faces turn red. He adds, "也不是所有人都支持我." (Not everyone supports me either.) A brief cutaway shows two crew members in black t-shirts with yellow 'R' logos, one pointing playfully while the other writes, with on-screen text '范导你的兵在此' and an off-screen voice chanting, "支持范导,打倒姚导!" (Support Director Fan, overthrow Director Yao!), followed by a gong sound, adding a humorous, game-show atmosphere. The blonde-haired man then asks, "你实话谁私下跟你关系最不好?" (Honestly, who has the worst relationship with you privately?), prompting an exaggerated "太多了!" (Too many!) from the reddish-haired man, followed by shared laughter. The blonde-haired man encourages him, "你挑吧,你概率应该还是很大的这分名单." (You choose, your probability should still be very high on this list.) The reddish-haired man sighs, "我来看看啊," as he continues to review the roster, suggesting a pre-recording meeting where roles and procedures are being reviewed under his temporary leadership.

The minute opens in a modern conference room, featuring vertical wood paneling and a large screen displaying the 'Keep Running' logo, all set to a lighthearted, whimsical background tune. The central figure, the Man with reddish hair in a white shirt, identified as the '临时总导演' (Temporary Chief Director), is seated at a long white table, actively reviewing a black folder labeled '工作人员花名册' (Staff Roster). He flips through pages, makes notes, and occasionally looks up to interact with the Man with blonde hair and glasses seated across from him, who appears attentive. The director immediately engages, playfully declaring, "全是你的兵佣" (They're all your pawns/soldiers), before asserting, "不行, 我要找找我的人" (No, I need to find my people). As he 'recruits' his team, circular inset frames appear, introducing various crew members, often accompanied by a distinct chime sound. He refers to the '跟拍摄像' (Follow Camera Operator) as "一號" (Number one) and affectionately as "我豪哥" (My Hao Ge), stating, "我把我豪哥南哥都带走" (I'll take my Hao Ge and Nan Ge with me). He then addresses the '商务摄像' and '商务导演' as "二位, 我的兵, 商务" (You two, my soldiers, Business), humorously adding, "今年这商务, 我太努力了" (This year's business, I worked too hard). He dismisses post-production as a "superhuman task" before directly calling out "音频!" (Audio!), referring to the '音频' (Audio Technician) as "我的兵" (my soldier). The director then jokingly complains about the costume team, stating, "服装组昨天想谋杀我" (The costume team tried to murder me yesterday) because "昨天给了我一件毛衣, 差点把我捂死" (Yesterday they gave me a sweater, almost suffocated me). Counting his 'recruits,' he exclaims, "我几位了, 我九位, 不好选啊" (How many do I have? I have nine, it's hard to choose), and self-deprecatingly adds, "人脉还是不够广" (My connections are still not wide enough). He concludes by deciding to "把开文哥带进来" (bring Kaiwen Ge in), suggesting further recruitment. Throughout, the director's voice is clear and expressive, conveying a professional yet amusing tone, while the crew members in the insets react with smiles and laughter, reinforcing the lighthearted atmosphere.

The video opens in a modern conference room, featuring vertical wood paneling, potted plants, and a large screen displaying the '奔跑吧' (Keep Running) logo. The man with reddish hair, identified by on-screen text as '临时总导演' (Temporary Chief Director) and '一日临时总导演', sits at a long white table, reviewing a black folder labeled '工作人员花名册' (Staff Roster) and making notes. He speaks, acknowledging a good choice with "你这个是真的挑的很对，确实," then playfully searches for the "副总编" (Associate Chief Editor), asking "我们的副总编呢？副呢？" and later exclaiming "这儿呢！" upon finding them. He addresses someone as "若言哥" and confidently declares, "我的九位兵我已经马齐了" (my nine soldiers are all assembled), a statement humorously echoed by the on-screen text '范导你的兵在此' as crew members enter. He counts aloud, "一二...三四...五...六七八," then notes, "没人了" (no one left), before deciding, "我我批地吧" (I'll approve it then) and "送你一票" (giving you a vote), directly relating to the game-like voting mechanics suggested by on-screen text like '剥夺投票资格' and '恢复投票资格'. Across the table, the man with blonde hair and glasses, in a light blue striped shirt, listens attentively. He then takes over, speaking in a calm, professional tone, outlining administrative tasks: "除了这些事情之外，我们还有一些其他的事务性的工作要跟你确认." He continues, explaining the next step: "现在也要把各个工作组的，主要的负责人请进来，然后我们一起来商讨一下明天的录制细节," to which the man with reddish hair responds with an acknowledging "好." The man with blonde hair then directs, "那那我们叫我们工作人员进来吧," prompting crew members in black t-shirts with yellow 'R' logos and blue lanyards to enter, some carrying materials. He concludes by offering open communication: "如果你现场有什么问题和指示，也可以随时的沟通，好不好啊，根据你的想法." The room, well-lit with a modern ceiling grid, also shows a whiteboard with photos and notes in the background, indicating pre-meeting preparations. An upbeat, light background music begins to play as the meeting progresses, maintaining the organized, collaborative, and light-hearted tone of the show's dynamic production environment.

The segment opens with an upbeat background tune as the Man with reddish hair, identified by on-screen text as '临时总导演' (Temporary Chief Director), is seen in a modern conference room. Seated at a long white table, he reviews a '工作人员花名册' (Staff Roster) folder and makes notes, with a '导演道具箱' (Director's Prop Box) before him. He greets the crew, saying "看視頻好,嘿嘿" (Watching the video, haha), then introduces the Man with blonde hair and glasses, revealing him as "我們的兄弟團成員范丞丞" (our brother group member Fan Chengcheng), and announces that "從現在開始以及明天的一整天,他是我們的總導演啊" (from now on and for the entire day tomorrow, he is our Chief Director). The crew, including a Crew member with glasses and blue lanyard, a Crew member with black t-shirt and blue lanyard, and a Woman with long dark hair, clap in response to the introduction. The Man with reddish hair then playfully asks, "姚一天明天什麼遊戲也都會參與吧?" (Yao Yitian, will you participate in all games tomorrow?), before revealing a game detail: "如果懲罰我是要接受懲罰,其實是一樣的" (if I am punished, I have to accept the punishment, it's actually the same). The Man with blonde hair and glasses (Fan Chengcheng) asks, "懲罰是什麼?" (What is the punishment?), to which the Man with reddish hair replies, "懲罰明天就知道,我們稍微有個懸念吧" (You'll know the punishment tomorrow, let's keep a little suspense), then jokingly suggests, "這樣懲罰去蹦極" (The punishment is bungee jumping). A crew member exclaims, "你幹嘛!" (What are you doing!), and another adds, "我也不敢" (I don't dare either), prompting the Man with reddish hair to conclude, "所以就別了吧" (So let's not do it then). Laughter erupts from the crew, accompanied by on-screen text like '反应迅速' (Quick Reaction) and '感觉被拿捏了' (Feeling Controlled), as the Man with reddish hair asks, "你倆談啥?" (What are you two talking about?). He then shifts to another topic, instructing, "讓藝人就是說盡量面朝機位拍攝的時候" (to ask the artists to try to face the camera when filming), and questions, "誰,誰老不面朝? 咱們最不面朝的人" (Who, who always doesn't face the camera? The person who faces it the least). The Man with blonde hair and glasses (Fan Chengcheng) asks, "我嗎?" (Me?), and the Man with reddish hair responds, "我不會" (Not me). The scene maintains a lighthearted, collaborative atmosphere, with the 'Keep Running' branding visible throughout.

event_blocks.summary: In a conference room with vertical wood paneling, the '临时总导演' (Temporary Chief Director), a man with reddish hair, reviews a staff roster and poses questions about dislikes, eliciting laughter from crew members in black shirts with yellow 'R' logos. A woman with long dark hair advises focusing on key individuals, as on-screen text '剥夺投票资格' (Revoked Voting Rights) appears. The director explains the need for directors to ensure clear shots of engaged participants, concluding the meeting with a call to adjourn, met with applause. A man with short dark hair checks his phone with satisfaction after a blue tissue is removed from his eye, as on-screen text '满意' (satisfied) appears. The director then refers to the meeting as a '密谋' (plot), which concludes, marked by on-screen text '“密谋”结束' (Plot ends). Upbeat music starts as a female voiceover introduces '范PD' (Fan PD)'s performance. Fan PD, now wearing white sunglasses, discusses team divisions, noting discrepancies in team sizes. He approaches a laptop displaying 'EP08 消失的TA 终审' (EP08 The Disappeared TA Final Review), as on-screen text '制裁' (Punishment) appears. He playfully denies being on a team and threatens to retract his authority when challenged. The scene shifts to an auditorium where Fan PD, now in a white t-shirt, asks about his screen time, referencing his perceived disappearance in a previous episode. He walks through an outdoor nighttime setting past the illuminated Galaxy Macau resort exterior and inspects a large outdoor pool, inquiring about the water temperature. He then interacts with crew members, including the woman with long dark hair, who hands him a whiteboard with handwritten team groupings like 'Q SY ZK' and 'LC FCC BL', confirming these are his '范PD提前定好的游戏分组' (Fan PD's pre-determined game groups) despite an alleged attempt to tamper with them. He announces the season will conclude in the water, met with crew agreement.

Man with reddish hair in white shirt.description: Seated at a long white table in a modern conference room, wearing a white shirt, reviewing a black folder labeled '工作人员花名册' (Staff Roster), making notes with a pen, and gesturing while speaking. Identified by on-screen text as '临时总导演' (Temporary Chief Director). He asks, '你还好, 你是不是?' (Are you okay? Are you?) and '谁最不爱面条?' (Who dislikes noodles the most?), then explains the director's role: '投入进去之后他们就忘了再拍, 非常投入, 这个时候导演就得提醒, 要保证他们的正面镜头什么的，就是看清他们的表达什么的，好吧?' (Once they get into it, they forget they're being filmed, they're very engaged. At this point, the director needs to remind them, to ensure their front-facing shots and such, to clearly see their expressions and so on, okay?). He concludes the meeting with '行, 那我们就散会了' (Alright, then we'll adjourn the meeting) and declares '密谋结束' (Plot ends). Later, as Fan PD, he is seen wearing white sunglasses and a blue lanyard, walking confidently in an auditorium, smiling as he approaches a laptop displaying a video titled 'EP08 消失的TA 终审' (EP08 The Disappeared TA Final Review). He discusses team divisions: '那个他刚让我分队, 我一队分五个, 一队分六个, 只有十个人哪来的六个?' (He just asked me to divide teams, I divided one team into five, one team into six. There are only ten people, where did the six come from?), and playfully asserts, '没有这件事情' (There's no such thing) and '那我要收回这个权利了' (Then I'm taking back this right), adding '你要叫我就收回这个权利了' (If you call me, I'll take back this right).

raw_segments: The segment opens in a modern conference room with vertical wood paneling, where a man with reddish hair, identified as the '临时总导演' (Temporary Chief Director), reviews a '工作人员花名册' (Staff Roster) at a long white table. He asks, "你还好, 你是不是?" (Are you okay? Are you?) and "谁最不爱面条?" (Who dislikes noodles the most?), prompting a male crew member to ask, "你再说一下谁?" (Could you say who again?). Laughter erupts among the crew members, who wear black shirts with yellow 'R' logos. A woman with long dark hair explains, "这没事, 这很正常, 明天就是要提醒, 有几个重点人你要关注他们就是" (It's fine, this is normal. Tomorrow we just need to remind, there are a few key people you need to pay attention to...). On-screen text '剥夺投票资格' (Revoked Voting Rights) briefly appears as the director gestures, emphasizing that "投入进去之后他们就忘了再拍, 非常投入, 这个时候导演就得提醒, 要保证他们的正面镜头什么的，就是看清他们的表达什么的，好吧?" (Once they get into it, they forget they're being filmed, they're very engaged. At this point, the director needs to remind them, to ensure their front-facing shots and such, to clearly see their expressions and so on, okay?). He concludes, "行, 那我们就散会了" (Alright, then we'll adjourn the meeting), echoed by a crew member saying, "散会!" (Adjourn!). The crew claps, and a man with short dark hair reacts to a blue tissue near his eye before checking his phone with a satisfied expression, marked by on-screen text '满意' (satisfied). The director then stands, gesturing toward the screen, stating, "那个, 会是开会, 密谋" (That, the meeting is a meeting, a plot), followed by "密谋结束" (Plot ends), which appears as on-screen text. A voice says, "好, 辛苦了, 辛苦了" (Okay, good work, good work). Upbeat, dramatic music begins as a title card appears, with a female voiceover announcing, "让我们来看看范PD的精彩表现吧!" (Let’s see Fan PD’s amazing performance!). The scene shifts to an auditorium where the same man, now referred to as Fan PD, walks confidently in white sunglasses, discussing team divisions: "那个他刚让我分队, 我一队分五个, 一队分六个, 只有十个人哪来的六个?" (He just asked me to divide teams, I divided one team into five, one team into six. There are only ten people, where did the six come from?). He approaches a laptop displaying 'EP08 消失的TA 终审' (EP08 The Disappeared TA Final Review). As he smiles, on-screen text '制裁' (Punishment) appears. He playfully asserts, "没有这件事情" (There's no such thing) in response to a crew member asking, "你在哪队?" (Which team are you on?), and declares, "那我要收回这个权利了" (Then I'm taking back this right) after another voice insists, "有" (There is), adding, "你要叫我就收回这个权利了" (If you call me, I'll take back this right). The segment ends with a close-up of the laptop screen as a woman's voice asks, "今年几批了?" (How many batches this year?).

The segment opens with an upbeat, light background music as a crew member holds a monitor displaying 'EP08 消失的TA 终审' (EP08 The Disappeared TA Final Review). The man with reddish hair, wearing white sunglasses and a blue lanyard, observes intently, asking "我镜头多吗？" (Do I have a lot of screen time?), to which another voice replies "还可以" (It's okay). He then remarks, "上期不多。上期后面30分钟说我消失了" (Not much last episode. The last 30 minutes of the last episode said I disappeared), prompting another crew member to ask, "那你干嘛去了？" (Then where did you go?). He responds, "不知道啊。老是说我在干嘛？你应该是再找，单纯的找东西" (I don't know. What do they always say I'm doing? You should be looking, simply looking for things). The scene shifts to him walking confidently through an auditorium with empty wooden seats, smiling as he approaches a laptop displaying the same video. He transitions to an outdoor nighttime setting, walking past the grand, illuminated Galaxy Macau resort exterior with golden lights. He proceeds to a large outdoor pool with floating platforms and tropical decor, where he crouches and inspects the area, asking "是冷的吗？" (Is it cold?). A crew member reassures him, "还好，这天感觉这水温还行" (It's okay, the water temperature feels alright today). He then playfully declares, "我以及学会了你这套话术了，没办法，辛苦了大家" (I've already learned your way of speaking, no choice, everyone worked hard), eliciting laughter from the surrounding crew. He interacts with a group of crew members, including a woman with long dark hair and a blue lanyard, who hands him a whiteboard with handwritten groupings like 'Q SY ZK' and 'LC FCC BL'. A female voice asks, "那就是你刚刚分的组？" (So those are the groups you just divided?), to which the man, identified as '范PD' by his white t-shirt, confirms, "对。老一天试图篡改我的分组" (Yes. Lao Yitian tried to tamper with my groups). Another voice denies, "没有篡改" (No tampering), and 范PD clarifies, "试图" (Tried), followed by laughter. On-screen text '范PD提前定好的游戏分组' (Fan PD's pre-determined game groups) appears. The female voice then states, "待会儿就按这个给大家" (Later, we'll give everyone according to this), and 范PD confirms, "就按这个给他们穿了啊" (So they'll wear according to this). The segment ends with 范PD standing among the crew, smiling and gesturing, as he announces, "然后我们这一季也将会再水中杀青" (And this season, we will also conclude in the water), met with laughter and a crew member's "可以" (Okay) and a female voice adding "听你的" (Listening to you), suggesting a playful yet strategic planning phase for the upcoming game.

event_blocks.summary: In a modern conference room with wood paneling and potted plants, the Temporary Chief Director, a man with reddish hair in a white t-shirt and blue lanyard, reviews a Staff Roster at a table, saying "好" (good/okay) in response to another male voice. He interacts with crew members, including one in a black t-shirt with a yellow 'R' logo and blue lanyard holding a monitor displaying 'EP08 消失的TA 终审', during a pre-recording meeting under the 'Keep Running' logo on a large screen, accompanied by light, reflective background music. The scene then transitions outdoors to a grand, ancient-style stone amphitheater under a bright blue sky. 杰妮, the female host wearing a black off-the-shoulder top and white pants, stands in the center of a geometrically patterned courtyard, holding a black device and gesturing while delivering a closing message for the show. On-screen text announces this as the final episode of '奔跑吧' Season 13, titled '跑男来了', expressing sentimentality about farewells and anticipation for future episodes. 杰妮 concludes, "本期节目是奔跑吧13季的最后一期跑男来了，虽然每一次告别都非常的伤感，但是我们短暂的告别是为了下一次更美好的相遇。大家可以期待一下我们下一期节目会跑去哪些地方呢？那我们下期节目再见啦！" (This episode is the final episode of Keep Running Season 13, 'Running Man is Here'. Although every farewell is very sentimental, our brief farewell is for a more beautiful reunion next time. Everyone can look forward to where we will run to in the next episode? Then we'll see you in the next episode!), waving goodbye as the 浙江卫视 logo appears, concluding the segment with a warm, reflective tone and continuing background music.
